definitive_source_repo_role: Local static reconstruction of archived passionsjustlikemine.com. Read-only from the perspective of this site; this site references but never modifies it.
source_authority_policy: Archived passionsjustlikemine.com / the local reconstruction derived from it is always authoritative for facts, pages, lyrics, assets, and provenance records it covers. Every other source is additive review material only; secondary sources may supplement but may not replace passionsjustlikemine.com-derived content.
overwrite_policy: No passionsjustlikemine.com-derived page, lyric, fact, asset, inventory record, or source-of-truth assertion may be overwritten, normalized, superseded, or weakened by any secondary source, Wayback lyric candidate, advisor recommendation, or automated workflow without John's express authorization. Conflicts between a secondary source and passionsjustlikemine.com are recorded as candidates for review, not applied.
conflict_handling: Conflicts between a secondary source and PJLM are recorded as candidate-for-review records. The PJLM-derived content remains in place until John explicitly authorizes a change.
first_future_ingestion_effort: A later network-enabled phase will target retired Smiths/Morrissey lyric sources as captured by the Wayback Machine to recover as many lyric pages as possible. The scaffold phase performs no crawling.

enforcement.note: Doctrine encoded in metadata and prose. Any future candidate-merge tool must read this file before applying any change that could touch PJLM-derived content.
